name: inbound-cph
description: Kunde Specialist skills for Inbound CPH: client briefs, proactivity scans, weekly pulses, voice checks, onboarding, Google Ads audit, RSA annoncetekster (ad-copy generation), search terms analysis, and post-launch RSA asset-hygiene diagnostics (Danish-default)

inbound_root_folder_id.title: Inbound CPH Drive folder ID
inbound_root_folder_id.description: The Google Drive folder ID for the inbound-cph/ root folder where all client folders live. Defaults to the shared agency folder. Override only if you have a different mount.
